title: T-034 — UI: TEC-012 Item Detail page with tabs
prompt:
# T-034 — UI: TEC-012 Item Detail page with tabs

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §6.5, §4A TEC-012
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:483-605` (material_detail_screen)

## Goal
Item detail page with 8 tabs and RBAC-aware action buttons (Edit, Deactivate).

Use shadcn Tabs primitive. Edit button (TEC-013) reuses TEC-011 wizard in edit mode. Deactivate button opens TEC-081 modal. Tabs lazy-load via Suspense.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/items/[item_code]/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/items/[item_code]/_components/tabs/*.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-012-item-detail.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Sub-tab implementations beyond stub (e.g., BOM tab uses T-037 child)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the detail page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:483-605, then it shows the same 8 tabs in the same order, the same header layout with Edit/Deactivate actions, and uses shadcn Tabs primitive — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given user lacks technical.items.edit, when the page renders, then the Edit button is disabled or hidden.
3. Given user clicks Deactivate, when modal opens, then TEC-081 deactivate modal appears.
4. Given GET /items/:code returns 404, when page renders, then a not-found message replaces the body.
5. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for tab structure + RBAC + 404 path.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-012-item-detail.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not collapse tabs into a single page.
- Do not expose private_jsonb to non-owner.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:483-605` (material_detail_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
